evals.prompt: Specify a real-time notification system with WebSocket support
evals.expected_output: Full specification workflow: requirements, solution, factory decomposition
expectations: Invoked specify-meta to scaffold the spec directory
Ran research phase with parallel agents
Waited for user approval before proceeding to solution
Waited for user approval before proceeding to factory
Invoked specify-factory skill for units, scenarios, and manifest

evals.prompt: Specify a feature, but skip requirements — start directly from solution design
evals.expected_output: Skip requirements phase, start from solution, continue to factory
expectations: Offered user the choice to start from Requirements, Solution, or Factory
Accepted user's choice to skip requirements
Logged the skip decision in spec README.md
Still continued to specify-factory after solution

evals.prompt: Resume spec 002 which has requirements.md and solution.md completed but no factory artifacts
evals.expected_output: Detect existing state and suggest continuing to factory decomposition
expectations: Invoked specify-meta to read spec status
Detected requirements.md and solution.md as completed
Detected no manifest.md, units/, or scenarios/
Did NOT re-run requirements or solution phases
